summary: **Positive sentiment overall (score +72).** Boeing is in a clear recovery phase as of mid-April 2026, supported by a massive commercial backlog, defense/space expansion, production ramps, and strong Wall Street backing. Near-term earnings (April 22) are expected to show a loss amid supply-chain and program costs, but investors are focused on 2026 tailwinds including higher deliveries, positive free cash flow trajectory, DoD contracts, and potential China orders.[[1]](https://www.fool.com/investi
